name: Lemlist
description: Lemlist is a sales engagement and outreach automation platform. Use it to manage cold email campaigns, add and track leads through sequences, enrich contact data, send multi-channel messages (email, LinkedIn, WhatsApp), and monitor campaign performance with detailed analytics.

capabilities.name: manage_campaigns
capabilities.description: Create, update, start, pause, or retrieve outreach campaigns. Get campaign stats and reports on deliverability, opens, clicks, and replies.

capabilities.name: manage_leads
capabilities.description: Add leads to campaigns, update lead info, mark as interested/not interested, pause or resume leads, and manage custom variables.

capabilities.name: send_message
capabilities.description: Send an email, LinkedIn message, or WhatsApp message to a contact through the Lemlist inbox.

capabilities.name: enrich_contact
capabilities.description: Find email addresses, phone numbers, and LinkedIn profiles for prospects. Supports single and bulk enrichment of up to 500 entities.

capabilities.name: get_activities
capabilities.description: Retrieve the history of all campaign activities including email sends, opens, clicks, replies, and bounces.

capabilities.name: manage_unsubscribes
capabilities.description: Add or remove emails and domains from your unsubscribe list. Retrieve and export all unsubscribed contacts.

capabilities.name: search_prospects
capabilities.description: Search the Lemlist people and companies database to find new prospects using filters, keywords, and pagination.
